iron_condor.name: Iron Condor
iron_condor.description: Sell OTM put+call spreads. Win when price stays in range. ~84% win rate with 0.16 delta.

long_call.name: Long Call
long_call.description: Buy call option. Profit from upward movement.

long_put.name: Long Put
long_put.description: Buy put option. Profit from downward movement.

bull_call_spread.name: Bull Call Spread
bull_call_spread.description: Buy lower + Sell higher call. Bullish with limited risk.

bull_put_spread.name: Bull Put Spread
bull_put_spread.description: Sell higher put, buy lower put. Bullish credit spread with defined risk.

bear_call_spread.name: Bear Call Spread
bear_call_spread.description: Sell lower call, buy higher call. Bearish credit spread with defined risk.

bear_put_spread.name: Bear Put Spread
bear_put_spread.description: Buy higher + Sell lower put. Bearish with limited risk.

long_straddle.name: Long Straddle
long_straddle.description: Buy ATM call+put. Profit from big move either direction.

short_straddle.name: Short Straddle
short_straddle.description: Sell ATM call+put. Profit when price stays flat.

long_strangle.name: Long Strangle
long_strangle.description: Buy OTM call+put. Cheaper than straddle.

short_strangle.name: Short Strangle
short_strangle.description: Sell OTM call+put. Collect premium if range-bound.

butterfly_spread.name: Butterfly Spread
butterfly_spread.description: Buy 1 low, Sell 2 mid, Buy 1 high. Max profit at middle.

iron_butterfly.name: Iron Butterfly
iron_butterfly.description: Like iron condor but centered at ATM.

calendar_spread.name: Calendar Spread
calendar_spread.description: Sell near-term + Buy far-term same strike.

jade_lizard.name: Jade Lizard
jade_lizard.description: Short strangle + short put. No upside risk.

covered_call.name: Covered Call
covered_call.description: Own stock + Sell call for income.

protective_put.name: Protective Put
protective_put.description: Own stock + Buy put for insurance.

collar.name: Collar
collar.description: Own stock + Buy put + Sell call.

custom_strategy.name: Custom Strategy
custom_strategy.description: Build your own strategy with custom legs.
